data.title: Tidio's New AI Features: Boost Sales and Support Today
data.excerpt: Discover Tidio's latest AI tools for customer service that drive sales and streamline support. Perfect for e-commerce and SaaS. Start your free trial now!

$media.alt: Tidio's New AI Features: Boost Sales and Support Today

children.text: Introduction

In the fast-paced world of online business, keeping customers happy and engaged is everything. That's where Tidio comes in—a game-changing platform that's just rolled out incredible new features to transform how you handle customer interactions. Imagine turning every product question into a sale effortlessly, thanks to smart AI that learns and adapts. I've been exploring Tidio, and I'm thrilled to share why these updates make it a must-try for anyone serious about growth.
Check out Tidio's innovative solutions here
and see the difference for yourself.
Disclosure: This post contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission if you make a purchase, at no extra cost to you.
What is Tidio?

At its core, Tidio is a customer service platform powered by AI, designed to supercharge your support and sales efforts. It combines live chat, chatbots, and automation tools into one seamless dashboard, making it ideal for e-commerce stores and SaaS businesses. What I love is how it simplifies complex tasks—whether it's answering FAQs in real-time or guiding customers through purchases. If you're curious about the basics,
learn more about what Tidio is
in our detailed guide.
Tidio's New and Featured Functions
Tidio's recent updates are all about leveraging AI to drive results, and they're nothing short of impressive. Here's a breakdown of the standout features:
Lyro AI Agent

The star of the show is Lyro, Tidio's AI agent that handles repetitive queries with human-like precision. It's not just a chatbot; it learns from interactions to provide accurate answers, freeing up your team for more complex issues. I've seen it reduce response times by up to 70% in some cases.
AI-Powered Product Recommendations

One feature that blew me away is how Lyro turns product questions into sales opportunities. When a customer asks about a product, the AI analyzes their behavior and suggests related items or upgrades, boosting average order values naturally. This is a huge win for e-commerce sites looking to increase revenue without aggressive upselling.
Flows Automation for Support & Sales

Tidio's automation flows let you create custom sequences for common scenarios, like cart abandonment or onboarding. You can set triggers and actions that guide customers through a journey, all while collecting valuable data. It's like having a 24/7 sales assistant that never sleeps.
Unified Analytics and Reporting

The new dashboard brings all your metrics into one place—live chat performance, AI resolution rates, and sales conversions. This clarity helps you make data-driven decisions quickly, without juggling multiple tools. For a deeper dive into practical applications, explore
Tidio use cases
on TonyCiencia.

These features work together to create a frictionless experience. For instance, during a peak shopping hour, Lyro can handle initial inquiries, recommend products, and escalate only the most complex cases to your human agents, ensuring no customer is left waiting.
See how Tidio can elevate your business
with these tools.
Who is Tidio Ideal For?
Tidio shines for a variety of users, but it's particularly perfect for:
E-commerce Businesses
: If you run an online store, Tidio's product recommendations and cart recovery flows can directly lift sales. It integrates smoothly with platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce.
SaaS Companies
: For software services, the AI agent can handle onboarding questions, subscription management, and technical support, reducing churn and improving user satisfaction.
Startups and Small Teams
: With scalable pricing, even solo entrepreneurs can access enterprise-level AI without the hefty cost. It's designed to grow with you.
Customer Support Teams
: If your team is overwhelmed, Tidio's automation cuts down on repetitive work, allowing agents to focus on high-value interactions.
No matter your size, if you value efficient, personalized customer service that drives growth, Tidio is built for you.
Find out why Tidio stands out
in our detailed analysis.
Flexible Pricing Plans for Every Business

One thing I appreciate about Tidio is its transparent, volume-based pricing that adapts to your needs. Plans start with basic features and scale up as you grow, so you're never paying for more than you use. The AI-powered tiers, like the Lyro AI Agent, offer incredible value—you pay only for AI conversations, which keeps costs low while maximizing impact.

For example, if you have 100 billable conversations a month, you can get a plan that includes both AI and human support, with unified analytics to track your ROI. This flexibility means you can experiment with new features without a long-term commitment. It's refreshing to see a platform that aligns its success with yours.
Explore Tidio's pricing options
to find the best fit for your budget.
How to Get Started with Tidio
Getting up and running with Tidio is straightforward:
Sign Up and Install
: Create an account on tidio.com and add the code snippet to your website—it takes just minutes.
Customize Your AI Agent
: Train Lyro by uploading your FAQ documents or past chat logs. The AI learns quickly, so you'll see improvements within days.
Set Up Automation Flows
: Use the drag-and-drop editor to build sequences for common queries, like order status checks or product inquiries.
Integrate with Your Tools
: Connect Tidio with your CRM, email marketing, or e-commerce platform for a unified workflow.
Monitor and Optimize
: Use the analytics dashboard to refine your strategies based on real data.
For a step-by-step walkthrough, check out our guide on
how to use Tidio
. It's packed with tips to get the most out of the platform from day one.
Why Tidio Stands Out in AI Customer Service

In a crowded market, Tidio differentiates itself through its focus on conversion-driven features. While other tools offer chatbots, Tidio's AI is specifically tuned to drive sales, not just handle support. The product recommendation engine is a prime example—it turns passive inquiries into active revenue streams.

Moreover, the seamless blend of AI and human touch ensures customers always feel heard. You can start with automation and smoothly transition to live agents when needed, all within the same chat window. This hybrid approach reduces friction and builds trust, which is crucial for long-term loyalty.

Another advantage is its ease of use. The interface is intuitive, so even non-technical users can set up complex workflows. Plus, with regular updates and a strong support community, Tidio is always evolving to meet modern demands.

for leveraging these strengths in your business.

Final Thoughts

Tidio's new AI features are a testament to how customer service can be both efficient and profitable. Whether you're looking to reduce support tickets, increase sales, or simply provide a better customer experience, this platform delivers. I've seen firsthand how it can transform business operations, and I'm confident it can do the same for you.
Ready to see the magic in action?
Start your Tidio journey today
and unlock the full potential of AI-powered customer engagement. With its user-friendly setup and powerful features, you'll wonder how you ever managed without it.

children.text: What is Tidio's Lyro AI Agent?

Lyro is Tidio's AI-powered agent that handles customer queries with human-like responses, automates support, and provides product recommendations to boost sales. It learns from interactions to improve over time.
How does Tidio help e-commerce businesses increase sales?

Tidio's AI analyzes customer questions and suggests relevant products, turning inquiries into sales opportunities. Features like cart abandonment flows and real-time support also help recover lost revenue and enhance customer satisfaction.
Is Tidio suitable for small businesses with limited budgets?

Absolutely! Tidio offers flexible, volume-based pricing that scales with your needs. Small businesses can start with basic plans and access AI features without high upfront costs, making it an affordable yet powerful tool.
